name: Mutual NDA - Standard Terms
description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement covering confidentiality obligations, permitted disclosures, and information protection between two parties.

name: Mutual NDA - Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, including fields for purpose, effective date, term, governing law, and party signatures.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement covering SaaS access and use, restrictions, privacy, payment, warranties, liability, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early product access, feedback programs, and product improvement partnerships.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement covering uptime targets, response times, service credits, and related remedies.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement covering service delivery, intellectual property, payment, warranties, and indemnification for consulting and professional services.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement covering GDPR compliance, data processing obligations, restricted transfers, security incidents, and audit rights.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement covering cooperation obligations, trademark licensing, payment, confidentiality, and indemnification between business partners.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement covering on-premises or installed software licensing, restrictions, payment, warranties, and intellectual property.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for trial or evaluation access to a product, covering pilot access, restrictions, confidentiality, and disclaimers.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement for HIPAA compliance, covering PHI safeguards, breach notification, subcontractor obligations, and audit rights.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum covering AI service usage, model training restrictions, input/output ownership, and AI-specific disclaimers.
